Quantum computers, once seen as a remote theoretical possibility, are now being developed by some of the largest computing companies in the world, and there is a material risk that within 5 to 10 years they will be able to decrypt sensitive data being communicated today.
It is important that businesses relying on secure communications examine the issue and assess their quantum risk.
